title: Community Arsenal
body:
![Community Arsenal TXT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d28e7ef85cb3c71409288d0c4f2a131412f7e0ce.png)


## Silver Weaponry

### Silver Ingot

Combining Iron Ingot and a Bottle o' Enchanting in the smithing table creates Silver Ingot

Making a weapon with this new ingot makes it so it can bypass Totem Of Undying.

### Silver Cleaver

8 Attack Damage
1.6 Attack Speed

Works as an axe and has access to these new enchants:

- Obfuscation
- Smoke Screen

### Silver Saber

7 Attack Damage
1.6 Attack Speed
+ 0.75 Attack Range
+ 1 Reach

Works as a sword and has access to:

- Smoke Screen
- Silver Splash

### Silver Scythe

8 Attack Damage
1.3 Attack Speed
+ 1 Attack Range
+ 1.5 Reach

Works as an axe and has access to:

- Smoke Screen
- Silver Splash

## Silver Weapon Enchants

### Smoke Screen

- Summons a blanket of smoke that anybody except the one who placed walks into it get's Smoke Screen effect making hard to see for them.

### Silver Splash

- Spew out silver pellets, making the effected entities be poisoned by Silver, making them unable to use Totem Of Undying

### Obfuscation

- When you critically hit an entity it will give them Obfuscation effect making so they cannot see their health bar.
